textByHashes.9213bf3fc445e076dd479048a75a90f707351123: Oh, it's part of a little test I'd like to do. A travelling salesman stopped off here a while ago and claimed you can use a duck to accurately track currents in the sea.
textByHashes.b912014e2e4e8062a9d0120cc4006fccf6bb88af: My plan is to track the currents around Catherby to see if I can speed up the docking process, but there's a bit of a snag...
textByHashes.edceeafc562c68980480ab52e4fb8e00691f58df: The local council have a by-law forbidding non-human workers from doing business in Catherby. I'd hoped the local councillor wouldn't notice, but the second the duck arrived, she came along making threats of a fine!
textByHashes.9fe43c7078766023142138b22aa65dff60b31fb2: I don't think so, but thanks for the offer.
textByHashes.929c2a7918e6c215701ea60e7769c185ad9cf423: Well, you're welcome to try talking to Councillor Catherine yourself. You'll find her in the Council Office north east of here. I warn you though, it will probably be an uphill struggle!
textByHashes.2edffa5979fe3fe9cfa9725fcd2f67b8a192c750: It's just north east of here. Good luck trying to deal with Councillor Catherine though.
textByHashes.6d7755a0c5e3f1c66fe545eb3c9f97f4b6751871: I'm afraid to say that the mayor died a few days ago.
textByHashes.a038d94170ee623b120b1406a39bf6b82e554ded: Don't worry, it happens all the time.
textByHashes.80fc5a1196d0864ba264c6c387b1323577a035af: Why do you need the mayor anyway?
textByHashes.4f1b33f7bd1c486ebdbfd3f239f7c917d2e211ec: Really? I don't recall that ever stopping Catherine before, but if she insists, I guess we can do this song and dance once more.
textByHashes.554569fd9d4b7ed055afac3d2e273b6c6fa12e82: We're going to need another mayor, but we need to make sure Catherine doesn't notice.
textByHashes.e3ea49f2398ae6adf08368dc81ddf024c502c162: Well, the Mayor of Catherby has been, for a long time now, a fish.
textByHashes.e89779a1417a13b31874a5b1a3c0f5c5ded3a5aa: Actually, to be precise, it has been 26 different fish, 25 of which were doing a fantastic job of pretending to be the first.
textByHashes.02e3e3517f5e01f090e596116cd393243c05dbe1: Well, unfortunately no one in Catherby really wanted the job. In fact, there was only one candidate, and it was the one person we all definitely didn't want to be the mayor.
textByHashes.36f3f0b83956b80fd823280e0e4e43cb84002dfa: It seemed like a good idea at the time. Problem is, Catherine responded by introducing that by-law preventing non-humans from working here.
textByHashes.d9018177f52cbf79c662f8ca748c1409c725e9bb: We were lucky that a different by-law she'd already introduced clearly stated that the mayor serves until death.
textByHashes.607c05ce121631339b1482a9e3e772cade58595f: A wise choice. Go and see Harry at the fishing shop. He should be able to help.
textByHashes.14eda454ea308fe192a3eca8c434a7b1f53119d5: You'll need to go and see Harry at the fishing shop. He should be able to help you sort out a replacement mayor.
textByHashes.f7d321226b47d69b4e5de003d91e2f0698e5a564: Well, I think I'll start keeping a stock of mayors on standby from now on.
textByHashes.8d2d7ad0b2f28cb0fd8b32b66513907102524332: Ah, of course. Let me just give him his mayoral chain...
textByHashes.fca6b805793eba7847127fce7e2dc2c77b967d4a: There! Catherine shouldn't be able to stop us getting the by-law changed now. You should go and speak with her.
textByHashes.d16cca803eeb0837ac55b4a0a956c27ee8c46949: You should speak to Catherine. Now that we have the mayor, she shouldn't be able to stop us getting that by-law changed.
textByHashes.5156d2b39952d8a888870df4792636ada6c11c1f: Excellent! Thank you for sorting that out for me. However, I do have one more thing I'd appreciate some help with.
textByHashes.fdcba58d0eedff8793ab3b07392d8ae04248f2d5: I have some repairs I need to do on my ship. Would you mind taking the duck out to test the currents yourself?
textByHashes.4e1efa7e5f18443e13a33b9924306bba8e5d695e: From what I've been told, you just need to release the duck, follow him while he tracks the currents, and then pick him up once he's done.
textByHashes.d6864b6cb22eff5c043dde068e83d4875b75d1f8: I saw a good spot next to that island east of the docks. The one with the obelisk on it.
textByHashes.d4450d2dbb9a1bc8f6b7532acd2100ada2b0ea48: Yes, I noticed. Luckily for us, he came wandering back to me. Make some room to hold him and I'll give him back.
textByHashes.64efa359a487190779c74e3040557c95a0a930d6: Yes, I noticed. Luckily for us, he came wandering back to me. Here you go.
textByHashes.ec132e340c8d8859e56da4b8435ac1d495c6056a: Thank you so much, friend! I'm sorry for all the nonsense you had to deal with. Please, keep the duck as thanks. I have no more need of him, and he seems to really like you!
textByHashes.9ab4807fc8e7d397a7369418151d6f097bf44d70: In fact, keep the mayor as well. It's not like I don't have plenty of spares.
textByHashes.671bdb1f68bf7dd4be9579a575be6bd6ee78a11b: Not to worry. As I say, I have plenty of spares.
textByHashes.512ffab54f10e560876516c58eb21ac14a671eda: I also have a little something else for you, but it appears you don't have space to take it. Please come back when you do.
textByHashes.ce9e8351258ece005d93aad858f1004683c6d111: I believe that puts us at mayor now. Long live the mayor.
textByHashes.149ee7a4f1eef2b8ea5c127f3e5312e1897b9e23: Don't mention it. All the best!
textByHashes.0fca378377b1a692fe16604913e4b9b4032eccda: Hello! Would you like to trade?
textByHashes.d8c40b0421a24e65af20345eeb872ed2f5dd3925: Yes, I use it to make deliveries to my customers up and down the coast. These crates here are all ready for my next trip.
textByHashes.c6ae325cc0b7b0e436c74bc6bf3f0c71ef3d92b8: Yes, I do have orders to deliver there from time to time. I think I may have some bits and pieces for them when I leave here next actually.
textByHashes.7d572aa7d196010aab24326e882cb5748b916063: I don't think Sir Mordred would like that. He wants as few outsiders visiting as possible. I wouldn't want to lose his business.
textByHashes.71ffc50cf160690ddedd8ad5b8aa0abb25c47e93: Hey, you gotta take business where you can find it these days! Besides, if I didn't supply them, someone else would.
textByHashes.11ab8c219a5a6de7ae13eb88ff9f5656ad71a4a4: Oh, various places up and down the coast. Mostly Karamja and Port Sarim.
textByHashes.069de98890350ca530d176433c0399e3286bb9f8: Sorry pal, but I'm afraid I'm not quite ready to sail yet.
textByHashes.b984bea8b5034b1cb81263fbe400f4ca1af3272c: I'm waiting on a big delivery of candles which I need to deliver further along the coast.
textByHashes.91fc33234b98584bb442fdcdb0f09b7f609c4c17: Business is going reasonably well... I wouldn't say I was the richest of merchants ever, but I'm doing fairly well all things considered.
textByHashes.3c89b87c3c7a700b1f1b9687ed50cf90c116fdf9: Hey buddy! Get away from my ship alright?
textByHashes.6ccbcd75d1aaa74230208303937c52591d0cf13d: Oh yes, well it won't be the first time...but just so I'm sure can you explain what you mean?
textByHashes.3ac3f6eebfe61278eef79cac282f34252ecb387c: Well, I've done a lot of research into Triple Redundant Aero Super Hawsers and it seems to have paid off, but answer me this one question. Why are you asking me this rather than the Gnome?
textByHashes.9f7513273e5679df0bc922797ee3e45ae4f55a2e: Hmm, really, is that so? Well, I do have some Triple Redundant Aero Super Hawser and I'll let you have some if you do me just one small favour.
textByHashes.9075b0ab52162e9c5d507300c01743c00716c1ee: No, this is a really quick thing and shouldn't take you longer than a few minutes.
textByHashes.297390b8b6bbe519dd002461d5ab546747b67cdc: I'm funding a rather expensive trade run to Brimhaven soon and I want to be sure that the weather isn't going to change and cause my ships any trouble.
textByHashes.9bacae5fa0058a9d70a6f735d592d28f06d0131a: The last thing I need is a load of goods going straight to the bottom of the ocean.
textByHashes.a550cd2c5229df33fc3203bac0f5ed3ce5007719: I just need you to pop along to Seers Village and ask those philosophers of foresight for a weather report. I believe a new seer there called Phantuwti can help you.
textByHashes.169b7ab1da2965e7ced21619cff718a2855c69c3: Wonderful...well the weather report is slightly unspecific, but I feel much better anyway for getting it. Hopefully now the Seers will take some responsibility if my ships go down to the bottom of the ocean.
textByHashes.f3a7c46bbcebf75ff3c1ad4a14e894f72d3ad63d: I'll get one of my associates to take some T.R.A.S.H to your Gnome Glider Pilot friend on White Wolf mountain. Once again, many thanks for your help.
textByHashes.0f18ee5b52f04e1fb28611e49832bd7cd6f3af81: The name's Arhein. I'm a local merchant. I have a variety of useful goods to sell here, and I also use my ship to deliver various items further afield.
textByHashes.88bcf583bd70ba5e863446bfddd71b3ea7c7e6bc: All sorts of things! Why don't you take a look?
textByHashes.9515e0dda461a1a7d5f896fcf737f45e8b7e30b5: Sorry, but that's not the kind of service I offer. Why not try the charter ship?
textByHashes.3429b67fadfc5dc5808f060236ffd564f03ad45e: Hey! Did I say you could board my ship?
